message:
🌱 Add i18n to 15 shared UI and dashboard components (#1161)

Extract hardcoded English strings from non-card components and replace
with react-i18next t() calls. Components: ChunkErrorBoundary (uses
i18next directly for class component), AgentSetupDialog, AgentStatus,
Login, AuthCallback, AlertDetail, AlertRuleEditor, Alerts, AIAgents,
AIML, Arcade, Pagination, CardSearch, ClusterFilterDropdown, and
StatsOverview. Add ~100 new translation keys to common.json.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@ import { Component, type ReactNode, type ErrorInfo } from 'react' import { RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react' +import i18next from 'i18next' // Reload throttle interval in milliseconds to prevent infinite reload loops const RELOAD_THROTTLE_MS = 30_000 // 30 seconds @@ -62,16 +63,16 @@ export class ChunkErrorBoundary extends Component {

- App Updated + {i18next.t('common:chunkError.appUpdated')}

- A new version was deployed. Please reload to continue. + {i18next.t('common:chunkError.newVersionDeployed')}

@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ export function AlertRuleEditor({ isOpen = true, rule, onSave, onCancel }: Alert const newErrors: Record = {} if (!name.trim()) { - newErrors.name = 'Name is required' + newErrors.name = t('alerts.nameRequired') } if (conditionType === 'gpu_usage' || conditionType === 'memory_pressure') { @@ -343,7 +343,7 @@ export function AlertRuleEditor({ isOpen = true, rule, onSave, onCancel }: Alert {weatherCondition === 'extreme_heat' && (
setDuration(Number(e.target.value))} className="w-24 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-secondary border border-border text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500" /> - seconds (0 = immediate) + {t('alerts.durationHint')}
@@ -437,28 +437,28 @@ export function AlertRuleEditor({ isOpen = true, rule, onSave, onCancel }: Alert {/* Notification Channels */}

{t('alerts.notificationChannels')}
